# Rise n Shine Driving School

Rise n Shine Driving School is the premier driving school in Kelowna, West Kelowna, and Peachland, BC. We specialize in calm, professional, and effective ICBC road test preparation for students of all ages.

## Core Services
- ICBC Road Test Preparation
- Defensive Driving Lessons
- Beginner to Advanced Training
- Professional 1:1 Coaching
- Road Test Vehicle Rental

## Contact Information
- Website: https://risenshinedriving.com
- Phone: +1 250-317-2175
- Areas Served: Kelowna, West Kelowna, Peachland, Lake Country, BC, Canada

## Key Business Data
- Certified and Licensed BC Driving School
- Specialized in calm coaching for beginners
- High First-Time Road Test Success Rates
- Operating Hours: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM, 7 days a week
- Instructor: Satpal Hans (Class-4 Licensed)

## Locations Served
- Kelowna
- West Kelowna
- Peachland
- Lake Country
- Winfield
- Central Okanagan area
